name: DynamicHedgingStrategy
description: Delta-neutral options strategy that sells a near-ATM strangle and continuously rebalances when delta drifts outside a configurable band. Adds protective long wings on IV spikes, supports gamma scalping, and includes emergency-exit, profit-lock, and portfolio-beta hedging controls.

deltaBandWidth.description: Rebalance when net delta drifts beyond ±this value

maxStrikeDistance.description: Maximum OTM strike distance from spot ($)

callStrikeOffset.description: Initial short-call OTM offset from spot ($)

putStrikeOffset.description: Initial short-put OTM offset from spot ($)

adjCallOffset.description: OTM offset for rebalancing call leg ($)

adjPutOffset.description: OTM offset for rebalancing put leg ($)

gammaSensitivity.description: Minimum estimated gamma to trigger a scalp

vegaLimit.description: Maximum net vega exposure per open position

minIvEntry.description: Do not enter if IV is below this level

maxIvEntry.description: Do not enter if IV is above this level

ivSpikeThreshold.description: IV level above which protective wings are added

emergencyLoss.description: Force-exit threshold: close if P&L falls below this ($/share)

profitLockThreshold.description: Roll to next expiry when P&L reaches this ($/share)

minPremiumPerLeg.description: Skip individual legs whose credit is below this ($)

maxAdjustments.description: Maximum number of delta-rebalancing rounds per trading day

adjustmentCostMax.description: Maximum acceptable transaction cost per adjustment ($)

hedgeRatio.description: Number of option contracts per share of underlying to hedge

portfolioBeta.description: Beta of portfolio vs index used for hedge-size scaling

rollProfitCapture.description: Roll the position when this fraction of max profit has been captured
